info.title: Librus Synergia API (SDK-supported subset)
info.description: Best-effort OpenAPI document generated from the SDK's supported child-scoped Synergia GET surface. Authentication starts on portal.librus.pl; this document covers the subsequent bearer-token calls against api.librus.pl/3.0.

servers.description: Child-scoped Librus Synergia API base URL.

tags.name: account
tags.description: Account and profile data for the currently selected child.

tags.name: grades
tags.description: Grades, averages, categories, comments, and related grade views.

tags.name: messages
tags.description: Inbox, message metadata, receiver groups, and attachments.

tags.name: announcements
tags.description: School notices exposed by the child-scoped Synergia API.

tags.name: school
tags.description: School, class, subject, classroom, and user metadata.

tags.name: homework
tags.description: Homework lists, homework assignments, categories, and attachments.

get.summary: Get the current child-scoped account context

parameters.name: gradeGroupId
parameters.description: Optional descriptive grade group identifier filter.

get.summary: Get timetable data for a week start or specific day
get.description: Provide exactly one of `weekStart` or `day` to mirror the supported SDK calls.

get.summary: Get a timetable entry by id

parameters.name: afterId
parameters.description: Return messages after this message id.

get.summary: List messages for a specific user
Get a message receiver group by id

200.description: Attachment payload. The live API may return a more specific content type.

get.summary: Get a school notice by id

200.description: Attachment payload. The live API may return a more specific content type.

bearerAuth.description: Child-scoped bearer token returned by the Librus family portal flow.
